name: ad-creative
tagline: Generates and iterates ad copy, static ad concepts, and video-ad scripts at scale across major ad platforms.
verdict: Comprehensive, well-structured skill: explicit grounding rules against fabricated claims, defined output formats, dated batch folders, platform spec validation, and bulk material split into reference files. Only ding: an oversized trigger-phrase-list description.

highlights.summary: Description is a ~1030-char wall of quoted trigger phrases, far past the 1-5 sentence guidance.
